benefits.description: Ipamorelin helped fill in indentions in the scar where tissue was lost due to necrosis
TB 500 and BPC 157 strengthened the thin scar tissue that had kept reopening; skin is now stronger and no longer reopening
GHK-cu injected intradermally near scar tissue to concentrate peptide effect locally; early use, outcomes pending

side_effects.description: Small bubbles formed at injection sites after intradermal injection; absorbed over time. Needle tracks visible as scabbing across wound.

protocol_notes: User had a tummy tuck in November 2021 (or 2024 given post date; likely 2024 given '5 months later it finally closed'). Necrosis set in 3 days post-op and took 5 months to fully close. Protocol focuses on intradermal/local injection near scar tissue rather than systemic delivery to concentrate peptides in the affected area. GHK-cu was newly added at time of post, stacked with TB 500 and BPC 157 injected locally near scar.
